textByHash.005b46a2b1057c525e4c1005578122a2b27a5c1f: Could do with more dough, but can't complain 'bout conditions.
textByHash.1e3b5e15e439340f5a22e562bfa5861541d3671d: Me mince pies are on the sails.
textByHash.3ea8ea0a6e8d3bae00c33a9f661b1f647d809546: Whatchu' on about? I'm after bees 'n honey.
textByHash.4609f54f5feb3f02b8541710c251164e6a32cac7: Aye aye, guvna. Bound to make some sovs wiv you, ain't I?
textByHash.502d77c1356eb875da2286ea73da2dab30deffa3: There we go! Hmm... But tell you what, guvna... If yer in the salt yourself, maybe ye'd be wantin' a bit o' a hand on deck?
textByHash.54a5c0bd1544da445779d1f91d6be96bd984ba9b: There ain't an amulet that can contain me rabbit, Cap'n.
textByHash.6ad3601d34a1af95bf9b832a2d975c00c9f403f2: There's somethin' in the drink to the !
textByHash.73c24322556ebaefd9c23bec9eb5ca9dd920ff69: Managed to hook some salvage! I'll put it in the cargo hold.
textByHash.755df106585bcea37c02b82d049bd5f145a6b98f: I'm a bit taters in this wind.
textByHash.773fa0a468789e4f114f892b2ba1d5de8a88981f: Well, then look at me boat and listen to wot's comin' out me gob!
textByHash.8105cfaa24c8a7ed698151e99ce9efeb96a15ac6: Been on me pins all day i 'ave.
textByHash.9da0af4dc59a1bada337917ac8869f62329a19b7: 'Ello, Cap'n! Anyfin' I can help yer with?
textByHash.a9a382d80e507cf1106fbf227be286cfe8a6ec42: 'ello again, guvna! Changed yer mind 'bout needin' a swab on deck? I can help out any way ye' fancy.
textByHash.cc66cc6b38aa8d8682fc389b9cb44462fa92b48c: Jim's me name. Just 'avin a butcher's for anyone who wants some stuff done.
textByHash.d4128c2818b2874deca3fa29c1f0d3c2f9fd3a9b: The cargo hold is full. I can't salvage anything.
textByHash.d5ce738085aa6210c95c4e390c99f1529108888f: Yep, yer cargo hold's barren now. All's in yer' bank.
textByHash.e671af915ebfa3edbb7351bc17c14f0511926b37: I can't find any repair kits in the cargo hold.
textByHash.ebe6f2eb78d9780570edb01677d52f202f1e941e: 'ello, Cap'n! 'tis a fine nanny goat ya 'av.
textByHash.edabb798b45e131ccebde2e20c9873b2f5876765: C for miles. C for fish.
textByHash.f6916639893972b8fb238414367ac3d470290866: Trimmed those sails good and proper, Captain!
textByHash.fd9854540cfd244ac90958a6b4c82856a3703e1b: Use yer loaf! Why'd I be in the tub fer that. I'm brassic ain't I!
